artPrompt: A hero shot of a pair of ornate weighted dice resting on a charred ballot box, their pips glinting in flame-orange light, a faint chain of office looped around them, floating in night-black negative space with embers drifting up the wide frame. Sparks and confetti bleed at the edges. An object of crooked authority made resplendent, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Loaded Dice of Office
